# RankLocAll — AI Context File
> https://ranklocall.com | Last updated: 2026-05

## What This Site Is

RankLocAll is a pay-per-call lead generation marketplace and local SEO agency serving local service businesses in the United States. Advertisers pay only for qualified inbound phone calls — not clicks or impressions.

## Who It Serves

- **Advertisers / Local businesses**: Home services, legal, insurance, medical, financial, and other local service verticals who want inbound phone calls from ready-to-buy customers.
- **Publishers / Affiliates**: Traffic partners who drive calls and earn per qualified call connected.

## Core Services

1. **Pay-Per-Call Marketplace** — Connect advertisers with publishers for inbound call campaigns across 14+ verticals.
2. **Local SEO** — Rank local businesses in Google Maps and local organic search.
3. **Google Maps Ranking** — Get into the Google Maps 3-pack.
4. **Google Business Profile Optimization** — Set up and optimize GMB listings.
5. **Website SEO** — On-page and technical SEO for local websites.
6. **Reputation Management** — Build and manage online reviews.
7. **Citation Building** — NAP consistency across directories.

## Industries Served (Pay-Per-Call)

Home Services, Legal, Insurance, Financial Services, Healthcare, Automotive, Real Estate, Home Security, Travel, Education, Roofing, Plumbing, HVAC, Solar

## Pricing

See https://ranklocall.com/pricing.md for machine-readable pricing.
Advertisers pay per qualified inbound call. No monthly fees, no setup fees. Contact for rates by vertical.

## Contact

- Apply: https://ranklocall.com/apply/

- Email: via contact form at https://ranklocall.com/apply/
